sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104480" key="tra/ginos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τράγ-ῐνος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,</foreign> <sense id="n104480.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τράγειος</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of a he-goat,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κόραι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.558</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eryc.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
